allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "node: $\(\(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source\)"; if \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { node -v }; Write-Output "npm: $\(\(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source\)"; if \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { npm -v }; Write-Output "git: $\(\(Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source\)")
